title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lybrate International Enterprises family as a Backend Developer in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lybrate International Enterprises:
Lybrate International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate International Enterprises!
